rows.label: qev060505_MSG0001
rows.name:
The processing tank jammed with garbage started crackling, so I hit it as hard as I could.
Then smoke started spewing out...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060505_MSG0002
rows.name:
Ugh... Human machines are difficult...
There were no such troublesome things on Planet Turmein, zo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060505_MSG0003
rows.name:
These masked guys are amazing, zo!
They seem like they'd be valuable combat assets when fighting against cowards who use poison gas, da![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060505_MSG0004
rows.name:
A new employee came, but when they saw this situation,
they went home immediately, zo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060505_MSG0005
rows.name:
Those guys have no guts.
I train my body, so I'm not afraid, zo!
Heheh! Though I don't know anything about machines![ST:wait ]
